summary: S&P 500 rose 1.02% to 7,209 (fresh ATH), Nasdaq +0.89% to 24,892, Dow +1.62% to 49,652. Caterpillar +10% on strong earnings. Meta -9% on elevated CapEx. Eli Lilly +7% on earnings beat. Asia-Pacific mostly fell. Oil extended gains on Iran blockade news.
